description: White sneakers, has a synthetic upper with top stitch detailing, blue foam stripes at the sides and reinforced heel collarCentral lace up fasteningPadded tongue and heel collarBranding in the front and at the heel collarCushioned footbed with branding at the heel regionTough rubber outsole with grooves and a pivot point at the forefoot regionWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
